/usr/bin/clang++-14  -std=c++17 -g CMakeFiles/sseq.dir/src/action.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sseq.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sseq.dir/src/tool.cpp.o -o sseq  /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangAST.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangASTMatchers.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangBasic.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangFrontend.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangSerialization.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangTooling.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangFrontend.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangParse.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangSerialization.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangSema.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangEdit.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangAnalysis.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangASTMatchers.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangAST.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangDriver.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangFormat.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangToolingInclusions.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangToolingCore.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangRewrite.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangLex.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libclangBasic.a /usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/libLLVM-14.so.1
